category_sources: source_facts.description; official README describes an OS X command-line utility for .webloc file icons.
display_name_sources: Official repository and README heading use setWeblocThumb.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents usage and automation; source_facts.homepage is the project homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/ali-rantakari/setWeblocThumb; per instruction, not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official README says it assigns custom icons/thumbnails to Web Internet Location .webloc files on OS X.
